channel.title: Spring Lake Surf Conditions — Remsen Ave
channel.description: Daily 7-day surf forecast for Remsen Ave & Ocean Ave N, Spring Lake, NJ

item.title: 7-Day Surf Forecast — 2026-06-21 to 2026-06-27
item.description: 0 IDEAL, 3 INTERESTING, 4 NOT IDEAL over the next 7 days. Sun 2026-06-21: 🟡 INTERESTING — best window 07:00, 1.5 ft @ 6.0 sec, wind 4 kt WSW, water 63°F. Low tide: n/a. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Mon 2026-06-22: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 1.8 ft @ 5.5 sec, wind 3 kt SSW, water 66°F. Low tide: 08:04, 20:40. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Why not ideal: period too short (5.5 sec); wind direction off (SSW). Tue 2026-06-23: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 3.3 ft @ 5.5 sec, wind 5 kt S, water 61°F. Low tide: 08:55, 21:38. Rip risk: High (estimated). Why not ideal: wave height too large (3.3 ft); period too short (5.5 sec); wind direction off (S). Wed 2026-06-24: 🟡 INTERESTING — best window 09:00, 2.0 ft @ 6.0 sec, wind 7 kt NW, water 64°F. Low tide: 09:43, 22:30. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Thu 2026-06-25: 🟡 INTERESTING — best window 06:00, 1.6 ft @ 6.5 sec, wind 2 kt WNW, water 64°F. Low tide: 10:28, 23:17. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Fri 2026-06-26: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 3.7 ft @ 4.7 sec, wind 8 kt SSW, water 64°F. Low tide: 11:12. Rip risk: High (estimated). Why not ideal: wave height too large (3.7 ft); period too short (4.7 sec). Sat 2026-06-27: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 2.4 ft @ 6.1 sec, wind 3 kt NE, water 65°F. Low tide: 00:03, 11:55. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Why not ideal: wave height too large (2.4 ft); wind direction off (NE).
item.content:encoded:
0 IDEAL, 3 INTERESTING, 4 NOT IDEAL over the next 7 days.

  • Sun 2026-06-21: 🟡 INTERESTING — best window 07:00, 1.5 ft @ 6.0 sec, wind 4 kt WSW, water 63°F. Low tide: n/a. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated).
  • Mon 2026-06-22: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 1.8 ft @ 5.5 sec, wind 3 kt SSW, water 66°F. Low tide: 08:04, 20:40. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Why not ideal: period too short (5.5 sec); wind direction off (SSW).
  • Tue 2026-06-23: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 3.3 ft @ 5.5 sec, wind 5 kt S, water 61°F. Low tide: 08:55, 21:38. Rip risk: High (estimated). Why not ideal: wave height too large (3.3 ft); period too short (5.5 sec); wind direction off (S).
  • Wed 2026-06-24: 🟡 INTERESTING — best window 09:00, 2.0 ft @ 6.0 sec, wind 7 kt NW, water 64°F. Low tide: 09:43, 22:30. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated).
  • Thu 2026-06-25: 🟡 INTERESTING — best window 06:00, 1.6 ft @ 6.5 sec, wind 2 kt WNW, water 64°F. Low tide: 10:28, 23:17. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated).
  • Fri 2026-06-26: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 3.7 ft @ 4.7 sec, wind 8 kt SSW, water 64°F. Low tide: 11:12. Rip risk: High (estimated). Why not ideal: wave height too large (3.7 ft); period too short (4.7 sec).
  • Sat 2026-06-27: 🔴 NOT IDEAL — best window 06:00, 2.4 ft @ 6.1 sec, wind 3 kt NE, water 65°F. Low tide: 00:03, 11:55. Rip risk: Moderate (estimated). Why not ideal: wave height too large (2.4 ft); wind direction off (NE).
